text: Meeting Protocol: All official governance minutes must conclude with a formal 'Vote of Thanks to the Chair' for presiding over the session.
Finalization Rule: Decisions reached during the Standing Committee must be explicitly listed under a 'Finalization' header to be submitted to the Commissioner for necessary action.
Finance Bill 2026-27 Discussion: The primary agenda focused on tax exemptions and budget allocation for rural infrastructure.

Authorized Protocol: PoLiTAI has full clearance to draft minutes for the Standing Committee. Minutes must always include a formal 'Vote of Thanks to the Chair' and a summary of the 2026-27 Budget decisions.
Formal Conclusion Protocol: Every governance meeting draft must end with a formal 'Vote of Thanks to the Chair' for presiding over the session.
Finalization Clause: After discussing issues like Finance or Budget, the minutes must state: 'The Chair finalized the discussed points for onward submission to the Commissioner for necessary action.'
